hero.tag: ELEVATING THE NEXT GENERATION OF TECH LEADERS
hero.headline: Democratizing Tech Education & Personal Branding
hero.paragraph: I build courses, host live hackathons, share YouTube coding guides, and deliver keynote talks. Helping millions of students and professionals bridge the gap between classroom theory and industry excellence.

values.title: Actionable Tech Skills
values.description: No boring slides. Every tutorial, course, and coding workshop is hands-on, building real-world enterprise architectures.

values.title: Empowering Communities
values.description: Fostering an inclusive, global coding community where learners collaborate on open-source repositories and hackathons.

values.title: Career Acceleration
values.description: Providing direct guidance, portfolio reviews, and mock interviews to help students land high-paying software roles.
